source.body_text_sample:
What we do
Platform
About us

Request a demo
About Us / Careers
Join our team

We’re a team of multidisciplinary specialists united in our passion to offer groundbreaking solutions to the highest standards. We achieve this by taking a creative approach to technology and leveraging our expertise to create engagement environments that people choose to engage with, again and again.

If you’d like to be considered for future opportunities, please send your CV and a brief introduction to info@splashdot.com. We’ll keep your information on file and reach out when a suitable role becomes available.

 

WHY WORK HERE
Perks

Enjoy all of the standard employment benefits out there today complemented by the other little things that set us apart: respect, inclusion, career development and an opportunity to make a difference personally and professionally.

Trajectory

We’ve been collaborating with lottery corporations for over 20 years; some of these tightly knit relationships extend back further with our clients than any of their other external support partners. Every year we’ve gotten bigger, better and smarter. And we’re just only getting started.

Your life. Your career. Hit the jackpot with Splashdot.

With almost zero employee turnover and over two decades of productive client relationships, we know we’re onto something. Our refreshing lack of hierarchy helps promote a fun and casual culture, and encourages open conversations that make everyone feel valued and welcome.

Work-l
